mapper.select: /* SQL ID : FileUploadPanelDAO.selectRepoInfo 설 명 : 리파지터리 정보를 조회 */ SELECT A.ATFL_REPO_ID AS repoCd , IF(B.MAXSZ = 0, 999999999, B.MAXSZ) AS limitSize FROM TB_LMS_ATFL_REPO A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ATFL_MAXSZ B ON A.ATFL_REPO_ID = B.MAXSZ_DTL_TYCD WHERE A.ATFL_REPO_ID = #{repoCd}

/* SQL ID : FileUploadPanelDAO.selectFileBoxLimitSize 설 명 : 파일함의 남은 용량 조회 */ SELECT A.ATFL_MAXSZ - IF(A.ATFL_MAXSZ = 999999999, 0, IFNULL(A.FILE_USE_SIZE, 0)) AS limitSize FROM ( SELECT MAX(IFNULL(IF(A.ATFL_MAXSZ = 0, 999999999, A.ATFL_MAXSZ), IF(B.ATFL_MAXSZ = 0, 999999999, B.ATFL_MAXSZ))) AS ATFL_MAXSZ , ( SELECT ROUND(SUM(BB.FILE_SIZE) / 1024 / 1024) FROM TB_LMS_ATFL_BOX AA JOIN TB_LMS_ATFL BB ON AA.FILE_ID = BB.FILE_ID WHERE AA.RGTR_ID = A.USER_ID AND BB.ATFL_REPO_PATH != 'TRANSFER' ) AS FILE_USE_SIZE FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT A JOIN TB_LMS_AUTHRT_GRP B ON A.MENU_TYCD = B.MENU_TYCD AND A.USER_AUTHRT_ID = B.USER_AUTHRT_ID AND B.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE A.USER_ID = #{rgtrId} AND B.ORG_ID = #{userOrgId} ) A

/* SQL ID : FileUploadPanelDAO.selectCreCrsLimitSize 설 명 : 개설과목의 제한 용량 조회 */ SELECT CASE WHEN 'BBS' = #{repoCd} THEN IF(BBS_ATFL_MAXSZ = 0, 999999999, BBS_ATFL_MAXSZ) WHEN 'FORUM' = #{repoCd} THEN IF(DSCS_ATFL_MAXSZ = 0, 999999999, DSCS_ATFL_MAXSZ) WHEN 'ASMNT' = #{repoCd} THEN IF(ASMT_ATFL_MAXSZ = 0, 999999999, ASMT_ATFL_MAXSZ) WHEN 'EXAM_ID' = #{repoCd} THEN IF(EXAM_ATFL_MAXSZ = 0, 999999999, EXAM_ATFL_MAXSZ) WHEN 'PROJECT' = #{repoCd} THEN IF(TEAM_ACTV_ATFL_MAXSZ = 0, 999999999, TEAM_ACTV_ATFL_MAXSZ) END AS limitSize FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_ATFL_MAXSZ WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}

/* SQL ID : FileUploadPanelDAO.selectBoardLimitSize 설 명 : 게시판의 제한 용량 조회 */ SELECT ATFL_MAX_CNT AS maxCnt , ATFL_MAXSZ AS maxSize , ATFL_MAX_CNT * ATFL_MAXSZ AS limitSize FROM TB_LMS_BBS WHERE BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND USEYN = 'Y'
